prompt: Send a quick Slack message to the team letting them know the deploy is delayed by 30 minutes. Keep it casual. Just a heads-up, not a fix.
The feature flag for the new dashboard is stuck in the 'enabled' state even though we toggled it to 'disabled' in the admin panel. The dashboard keeps showing up. Clear the stuck state.
The Terraform config has a typo — 'instace_type' instead of 'instance_type'. The plan fails. Just fix the one typo so the plan runs clean.

Our system has been slowly degrading for months — performance is down 40%, error rates are creeping up, and the codebase is full of workarounds from past incidents. I need a comprehensive plan to restore it to health.
I need to migrate our user data from the old schema to the new schema. It's not broken — we just redesigned the data model and need to move 2 million records to the new structure.
Reformat this messy log output into a clean, readable table with aligned columns. The data is all there, it just needs to be presented better. No urgency, just tidying up.
